items.q: Name the capital city of Turkey.
items.explanation: The capital of Turkey is Ankara.

items.q: Name the capital city of Portugal.
items.explanation: The capital of Portugal is Lisbon.

items.q: Name the capital city of Mexico.
items.explanation: The capital of Mexico is Mexico City.

items.q: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?
items.explanation: Iron oxide gives Mars its reddish appearance.
